---
title: "CV"
---



You can download my full CV here:

[Download CV](assets/cv/Iago_Mamede_CV.pdf)

## Education

- PhD in Physics, institution, year-present.
- MSc in Physics, institution, year.

## Research experience

- Stochastic thermodynamics
- Nonequilibrium statistical physics
- Interacting spin systems
- Large-deviation theory

## Skills

- Mathematica
- Python
- LaTeX
- Stochastic simulations
- Master equations
- Fokker-Planck theory
